---
title: "RNAseq_sPLSDA_tool"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r}
##############################################################################
##  sPLS-DA pipeline for RNA-seq counts – header-encoded sample metadata
##  Requires only ONE CSV file with #NAME / #CLASS rows
##############################################################################

####  USER SETTINGS  #########################################################
count_file     <- "ExpAnalyst_format_Expt_v_ConF.csv"  # see format above
min_count      <- 10                # gene filter
top_var_genes  <- 5000              # keep most-variable genes
ncomp_try      <- 2:4               # components to test
keepX_grid     <- c(50, 100, 200)   # genes to test per component
cv_folds       <- 5                 # M-fold CV
cv_repeats     <- 3                 # repeat CV this many times
out_dir        <- "splsda_results"
##############################################################################

dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

####  1.  PACKAGES  ###########################################################
pkgs <- c("DESeq2", "mixOmics", "ggplot2", "readr", "dplyr")
for (p in pkgs)
  if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages(p, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
library(DESeq2); library(mixOmics); library(ggplot2); library(dplyr)

####  2.  READ COUNTS + METADATA FROM HEADER  #################################
raw <- readr::read_csv(count_file, col_names = FALSE,
                       progress = FALSE, show_col_types = FALSE)

# --- extract header rows ----------------------------------------------------
sample_ids <- as.character(unlist(raw[1, -1]))
group_vec  <- as.character(unlist(raw[2, -1]))

# --- build count matrix -----------------------------------------------------
counts <- raw[-c(1, 2), ]                  # drop header rows
gene_ids <- counts[[1]]                    # first column = gene IDs
counts   <- as.matrix(counts[, -1])        # numeric part
mode(counts) <- "numeric"

rownames(counts) <- gene_ids
colnames(counts) <- sample_ids

# basic sanity
stopifnot(length(sample_ids) == ncol(counts),
          length(group_vec)  == ncol(counts))

meta <- data.frame(sample = sample_ids,
                   group  = factor(group_vec))

####  3.  GENE PRE-FILTERING  #################################################
keep <- rowSums(counts) >= min_count
counts <- counts[keep, , drop = FALSE]

####  4.  VARIANCE-STABILISING TRANSFORM  ####################################
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts,
                              colData   = meta,
                              design    = ~ 1)           # no DE design
vsd <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE)
vst_mat <- assay(vsd)

# keep top-variable genes
vars <- apply(vst_mat, 1, var)
top  <- names(sort(vars, decreasing = TRUE))[seq_len(min(top_var_genes,
                                                         nrow(vst_mat)))]
vst_mat <- vst_mat[top, ]

####  5.  PREP FOR mixOmics  ##################################################
X <- t(vst_mat)                 # samples × genes
Y <- meta$group                 # factor

 # If binary Y, we only need 1 component for PLS-DA
 if (length(levels(Y)) == 2) {
   message("Binary classification detected: restricting to 1 component.")
   ncomp_try <- 1
}
#### 6–7.  TUNING  +  FINAL MODEL  ###########################################
set.seed(123)

# how many classes?
n_classes <- length(levels(Y))

if (n_classes == 2) {
  ## ── BINARY CASE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  message("Binary classification detected: skipping tune.splsda()")

  # we only need 1 component
  best_ncomp <- 1

  # pick a default keepX (e.g. the smallest grid, or you could pick the median)
  # here I choose the smallest to be conservative:
  best_keepX <- rep(min(keepX_grid), best_ncomp)

} else {
  ## ── MULTICLASS CASE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ## ---- 6a.  pick sensible CV folds -----------------------------------------
  min_cl <- min(table(Y))
  if (cv_folds > min_cl) {
    warning("Reducing cv_folds from ", cv_folds,
            " to ", min_cl, " (min class size).")
    cv_folds <- min_cl
  }

  ## ---- 6b.  run tuner ------------------------------------------------------
  max_comp <- max(ncomp_try)
  tune <- tune.splsda(
    X, Y,
    ncomp        = max_comp,
    test.keepX   = keepX_grid,
    dist         = "max.dist",
    validation   = "Mfold",
    folds        = cv_folds,
    nrepeat      = cv_repeats,
    progressBar  = FALSE
  )

  ## ---- 6c.  harvest tuning choices -----------------------------------------
  best_ncomp <- as.integer(unlist(tune$choice.ncomp))[1]
  if (is.list(tune$choice.keepX)) {
    best_keepX <- unlist(tune$choice.keepX)
  } else {
    best_keepX <- tune$choice.keepX
  }

  ## ---- 6d.  safety cap on component count ----------------------------------
  n_allowed <- nrow(X) - 1
  if (!is.na(best_ncomp) && best_ncomp > n_allowed) {
    warning("Reducing ncomp from ", best_ncomp,
            " to ", n_allowed, " (limited by sample size).")
    best_ncomp <- n_allowed
    best_keepX <- best_keepX[seq_len(best_ncomp)]
  }
}

## ---- 7.  FINAL MODEL --------------------------------------------------------
model <- splsda(
  X, Y,
  ncomp = best_ncomp,
  keepX = best_keepX
)
saveRDS(model, file = file.path(out_dir, "splsda_model.rds"))

##--------8. There's nothing in this part--> don't know why this was skipped-------

saveRDS(model, file = file.path(out_dir, "splsda_model.rds"))

#### 9.  PLOTS  ##############################################################
# auto-switch between 1D vs 2D score plot
plot_comps <- if (best_ncomp >= 2) 1:2 else 1

pdf(file.path(out_dir, "sample_scores.pdf"), 7, 6)
plotIndiv(
  model,
  comp      = plot_comps,
  group     = Y,
  legend    = TRUE,
  ellipse   = (length(plot_comps) == 2),
  ind.names = FALSE
)
dev.off()

#### 10. EXPORT SELECTED GENES  ###############################################
library(dplyr)            # bind_rows()

sel_df <- bind_rows(lapply(seq_len(best_ncomp), function(k) {
  v <- selectVar(model, comp = k)          # $name and $value vectors
  data.frame(
    Component = k,
    Gene      = v$name,
    Loading   = v$value,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))

readr::write_csv(sel_df,
                 file.path(out_dir, "selected_genes_by_component.csv"))

message("✓ Selected-gene table written to ",
        file.path(out_dir, "selected_genes_by_component.csv"))




``` 


```{r}
###############################################################################
##  ORA / GSEA for sPLS-DA selected genes
##  (append after sPLS-DA model is complete)
###############################################################################

message("=== Enrichment analysis of sPLS-DA features ===")

####  A.  PACKAGES  ###########################################################
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(clusterProfiler)
  library(ReactomePA)
  library(AnnotationDbi)
  library(org.Gg.eg.db)        # ← change if not chicken
  library(KEGGREST)
  library(openxlsx)
  library(dplyr)
})

####  B.  READ SELECTED GENES ##################################################
sel_df <- readr::read_csv(
  file.path(out_dir, "selected_genes_by_component.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

if (nrow(sel_df) == 0)
  stop("selected_genes_by_component.csv is empty – nothing to enrich!")

####  C.  MAP TO ENTREZ IDs ####################################################
## -- detect ID type (Ensembl vs Gene Symbol) -----------
is_ens   <- all(grepl("^ENS", sel_df$Gene))
keytype  <- if (is_ens) "ENSEMBL" else "SYMBOL"
map_cols <- if (is_ens) c("ENTREZID", "SYMBOL") else c("ENTREZID")

gene_map <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  org.Gg.eg.db,
  keys     = sel_df$Gene,
  keytype  = keytype,
  columns  = map_cols
)

sel_df <- sel_df |>
  left_join(gene_map, by = setNames(keytype, "Gene")) |>
  filter(!is.na(ENTREZID))

if (nrow(sel_df) == 0)
  stop("No ENTREZ IDs could be mapped for the selected genes.")

####  D.  DEFINE UNIVERSE ######################################################
## -- all genes that survived expression filtering (rows in vst_mat) ----------
all_ids   <- rownames(vst_mat)
univ_map  <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  org.Gg.eg.db, keys = all_ids, keytype = keytype, columns = "ENTREZID"
)
gene_universe <- unique(na.omit(univ_map$ENTREZID))

sig_genes <- unique(sel_df$ENTREZID)

####  E.  OVER-REPRESENTATION ANALYSES ########################################
##  E1. GO-BP ORA --------------------------------------------------------------
ego <- enrichGO(
  gene          = sig_genes,
  universe      = gene_universe,
  OrgDb         = org.Gg.eg.db,
  keyType       = "ENTREZID",
  ont           = "BP",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  readable      = TRUE
)

##  E2. KEGG ORA ---------------------------------------------------------------
kegg_code <- "gga"                        # change for other species
kmap <- KEGGREST::keggLink("pathway", kegg_code)
kegg_term2gene <- data.frame(
  term = sub("path:", "", unname(kmap)),
  gene = sub(paste0(kegg_code, ":"), "", names(kmap)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
kdesc <- KEGGREST::keggList("pathway", kegg_code)
kegg_term2name <- data.frame(
  term = sub("path:", "", names(kdesc)),
  name = sub(" - .*", "", unname(kdesc)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
ekegg <- enricher(
  gene          = sig_genes,
  universe      = gene_universe,
  TERM2GENE     = kegg_term2gene,
  TERM2NAME     = kegg_term2name,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH"
) |>
  setReadable(org.Gg.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID")

##  E3. Reactome ORA -----------------------------------------------------------
ereact <- enrichPathway(
  gene          = sig_genes,
  universe      = gene_universe,
  organism      = "chicken",      # human = "human", mouse = "mouse"
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  readable      = TRUE
)

####  F.  PRERANKED GSEA (GO-BP) ###############################################
##  F1. determine which column is the loading weight --------------------------
weight_col <- setdiff(
  names(sel_df),
  c("Component", "Gene", "ENTREZID", "SYMBOL", "GENEID")
) |>
  (\(x) x[vapply(sel_df[x], is.numeric, logical(1))])() |>
  {\(.) .[1]}()

if (is.na(weight_col))
  stop("Could not find numeric loading column in sel_df")

message("• Ranking genes by '", weight_col, "'")

##  F2. build rank vector ------------------------------------------------------
rank_vec <- sel_df |>
  group_by(ENTREZID) |>
  slice_max(order_by = abs(.data[[weight_col]]), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  arrange(desc(.data[[weight_col]])) |>
  transmute(ENTREZID, rank = .data[[weight_col]]) |>
  tibble::deframe()

##  F3. run preranked GSEA -----------------------------------------------------
gsea_go <- gseGO(
  geneList      = rank_vec,
  OrgDb         = org.Gg.eg.db,
  ont           = "BP",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH"
)

####  G.  WRITE RESULTS ########################################################
as_df <- function(res, id_col = NULL) {
  if (is.null(res) || nrow(as.data.frame(res)) == 0)
    return(data.frame())
  df <- as.data.frame(res)
  if (!is.null(id_col) && id_col %in% names(df))
    df <- dplyr::rename(df, Genes = !!id_col)
  df
}

out_file <- file.path(out_dir, "splsda_enrichment_results.xlsx")
write.xlsx(
  list(
    GO_ORA   = as_df(ego),
    KEGG_ORA = as_df(ekegg),
    Reactome = as_df(ereact),
    GO_GSEA  = as_df(gsea_go, "core_enrichment")
  ),
  file      = out_file,
  overwrite = TRUE
)

message("✓ Enrichment workbook saved to: ", out_file)


```

```{r}
###############################################################################
##  PART 3 – Quick visualisations of ORA / GSEA results
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(enrichplot)
  library(ComplexHeatmap)
  library(UpSetR)
  library(ggplot2)
})

viz_dir <- file.path(out_dir, "plots")
dir.create(viz_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## ------------------------------------------------------------------ helpers
save_pdf <- function(plot, filename, width = 7, height = 5) {
  pdf(file.path(viz_dir, filename), width, height)
  print(plot)
  dev.off()
}

make_dot <- function(res, fname_stub, ttl, n_cat = 15) {
  df <- as.data.frame(res)
  if (nrow(df) == 0)
    return(invisible())

  p <- enrichplot::dotplot(res, showCategory = n_cat) +
       labs(title = ttl, x = "Gene ratio", y = NULL)
  save_pdf(p, paste0("dot_", fname_stub, ".pdf"),
           width = 7,
           height = 0.35 * n_cat + 2)
}

## ---------------------------------------------------------------- dot-plots
make_dot(ego,      "GO_ORA",    "GO BP ORA – sPLS-DA genes")
make_dot(ekegg,    "KEGG_ORA",  "KEGG ORA – sPLS-DA genes")
make_dot(ereact,   "React_ORA", "Reactome ORA – sPLS-DA genes")
make_dot(gsea_go,  "GO_GSEA",   "GO BP GSEA (loading-ranked)")

## ------------------------------------------------------ cnetplot (GO ORA)
if (exists("ego") && nrow(as.data.frame(ego)) >= 2) {
  p_cnet <- cnetplot(ego,
                     showCategory = min(10, nrow(as.data.frame(ego))),
                     node_label   = "all") +
            ggtitle("cnetplot – top GO-BP ORA terms")
  save_pdf(p_cnet, "cnet_GO_ORA.pdf", width = 9, height = 7)
}

## ------------------------------------------------------ emapplot similarity
if (exists("ego") && nrow(as.data.frame(ego)) >= 3) {
  ego_sim <- pairwise_termsim(ego)
  p_emap  <- emapplot(ego_sim,
                      showCategory = 30) +
             ggtitle("emapplot – GO-BP ORA term similarity")
  save_pdf(p_emap, "emapplot_GO_ORA.pdf", width = 9, height = 7)
}

## --------------------------------------------- GSEA running-score snapshots
if (exists("gsea_go") && nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_go)) > 0) {
  pdf(file.path(viz_dir, "GSEA_running_scores_top3.pdf"), 9, 6)
  for (id in head(gsea_go@result$ID, 3))
    print(gseaplot2(gsea_go, geneSetID = id))
  dev.off()
}

## ---------------------------------------------------------- UpSet of terms
term_list <- list()
if (exists("ego")   && nrow(as.data.frame(ego))   > 0)
  term_list$GO_BP <- ego@result$Description
if (exists("ekegg") && nrow(as.data.frame(ekegg)) > 0)
  term_list$KEGG  <- ekegg@result$Description
if (exists("ereact") && nrow(as.data.frame(ereact)) > 0)
  term_list$Reactome <- ereact@result$Description

if (length(term_list) >= 2) {
  pdf(file.path(viz_dir, "UpSet_enrichment_terms.pdf"), 7, 5)
  UpSetR::upset(
    fromList(term_list),
    nsets = length(term_list),
    order.by = "freq",
    mb.ratio = c(0.6, 0.4)
  )
  dev.off()
}

```


```{r}
###############################################################################
##  PART 3b – Faceted dot-plot for GO-BP ORA (mean signed loading)
###############################################################################

if (exists("ego") && nrow(as.data.frame(ego)) > 0) {

  library(stringr)
  library(ggplot2)

  # ---- 1.  unpack gene lists per term ---------------------------------------
  ora_df <- ego@result |>
    dplyr::select(ID, Description, GeneRatio, p.adjust, geneID, setSize)

  ora_long <- ora_df |>
    tidyr::separate_rows(geneID, sep = "/") |>
    dplyr::rename(ENTREZID = geneID)

  # ---- 2.  attach loading weights -------------------------------------------
  load_tbl <- sel_df |>
    dplyr::select(ENTREZID, Weight = !!weight_col)

  ora_long <- ora_long |>
    dplyr::left_join(load_tbl, by = "ENTREZID")

  # ---- 3.  summarise mean signed loading per term ---------------------------
  ora_scores <- ora_long |>
    dplyr::group_by(ID, Description, GeneRatio, p.adjust, setSize) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      MeanWeight = mean(Weight, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      Regulation = dplyr::case_when(
        MeanWeight >  0  ~ "Up-regulated",
        MeanWeight <  0  ~ "Down-regulated",
        TRUE             ~ "Mixed / Neutral"
      )
    )

  # keep top 10 per facet (by |MeanWeight|)
  ora_top <- ora_scores |>
    dplyr::group_by(Regulation) |>
    dplyr::slice_max(order_by = abs(MeanWeight), n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) |>
    dplyr::ungroup()

  ora_top$Description <- str_wrap(ora_top$Description, 45)

  # ---- 4.  plot --------------------------------------------------------------
  p_fac_or <- ggplot(ora_top,
                     aes(x = MeanWeight,
                         y = reorder(Description, MeanWeight),
                         size = setSize,
                         colour = p.adjust)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_colour_continuous(low = "red", high = "blue", name = "adj-P") +
    scale_size(range = c(2, 6), name = "Gene set\nsize") +
    labs(title = "GO-BP ORA pathways (sPLS-DA drivers)",
         x = "Mean signed loading",
         y = NULL) +
    facet_wrap(~ Regulation, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9))

  save_pdf(p_fac_or, "dot_GO_ORA_faceted_up_down.pdf",
           width = 8,
           height = 0.35 * nrow(ora_top) + 2)

  message("✓ Faceted ORA dot-plot written to: ",
          file.path(viz_dir, "dot_GO_ORA_faceted_up_down.pdf"))

} else {
  message("No GO-BP ORA results available – skipped faceted ORA plot.")
}


```
